name: Mashed Potaotes with Mushrooms and Leeks
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Butter, softened and cut into pieces
1/2 cup Sour cream at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potatoes until tender.
2. Heat 1/2 tablespoon butter in a skillet and cook the leeks for 5-7 minutes, until tender and golden. Set aside.
3. In a large skillet over moderate heat, cook the mushrooms in the remaining butter until they begin to render their juices. Increase the heat and continue cooking until they are almost dry. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. When the potatoes are tender, drain, peel, and return them to the pot. Toss over low heat to dry, then put through a ricer into a mixing bowl.
6. Beat in the softened butter, buttermilk, and salt and pepper to taste.
7. Spread half the potatoes on the bottom of a shallow baking dish. Scatter the mushrooms over the potatoes and the leeks over the mushrooms. Pour 1/2 cup sour cream over the mixture and cover with the remaining potatoes.
8. Bake, uncovered, for 45 minutes to 1 hour or until browned and bubbling.
